message:
fix: respect non-Claude agent overrides for Dog role

The initial Handler implementation hardcoded claudeHaikuPreset() as an
unconditional early return for role "dog", bypassing all RoleAgents
overrides. This broke towns using opencode/gemini/etc. as their agent.

Now Dogs default to Haiku but fall through to normal resolution when an
explicit non-Claude override exists in rig or town settings. Also makes
self-termination instructions agent-agnostic ("exit the session" instead
of Claude-specific "/exit").

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
